name: All Bran Seed Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, salt and seeds in a bowl.
2. In another large bowl, beat together orange juice, honey, eggs and cereal until combined.
3. Let stand for 2 minutes.
4. Add the flour mixture, stirring only until well combined.
5. Spread evenly in a greased loaf pan measuring 8.5 inches by 4.5 inches by 2 inches.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 40 minutes.
7. Let cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and allow to cool completely before slicing.
